Video.summary: Theresa and Darron were arrested for child endangerment after their toddler daughter was spotted begging for food and now face sexual abuse accusations. Then, Megan believes her fiancé Mark physically abused her baby, and possibly broke his leg!
Video.title: We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents

Image.alt: We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents
We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents
We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents

Video.summary: Kelly's boyfriend says he has no idea how posts from him seeking sexual favors from other women got on various websites; Genesis thinks his wife cheats while he is at work.
Video.title: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Image.alt: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Video.summary: Sherry was raped at 15 and ran away from home. She’s asked for Steve’s help to reunite her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and abusive father Nick.
Video.title: Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother

Image.alt: Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother
Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother
Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother

Video.summary: Risha is accused of being involved in her best friend's murder; an update on Tabatha, who revealed on the show that her boyfriend allowed her to prostitute so they could get high together.
Video.title: Murder Accusations Cause Chaos

Video.summary: Robert says he believes that his daughters mother has been abusing her and he wants to prove the abuse and gain full custody of his daughter. Then, Casey claims her ex-boyfriend is abusive towards their kids and she wants him out of their lives.
Video.title: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Image.alt: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Video.summary: Martin won't let his son to marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back but he wants another man!
Video.title: Mom Stole My Lady Love!

Video.summary: Whitney learns what really happens during her children's father's late-night sessions at the recording studio; new mom Coralena is engaged in a war between her fiance and her friend; Denzel's girlfriends fight over him.
Video.title: Big Booty Mistakes

Video.summary: Tim doesn't know if he wants to be with Desiree, his wife and mother of his daughter, or Victoria his gorgeous coworker and Mistress. Then, Olivia is here because she's sick and tired of her husband Fred's cheating ways.
Video.title: Saucy Mistresses

Video.summary: Tony admits to his girlfriend that he likes to dress in women's clothes and that he secretly has a boyfriend! Next James says his wife moved back home with him but she also brought her new boyfriend!
Video.title: Bisexual Betrayals

Video.summary: Kim says her husband of 7 years became possessive, lazy and demanding. So she got her revenge by sleeping with his father, Daniel! Later Chris is a player who's dating 2 women at the same time and they are not happy about it!
Video.title: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Image.alt: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Video.summary: A transgender man has second thoughts about marrying a woman; Germaine wants his ex to take him back and reveals a secret; Stormie's husband gives her an ultimatum.
Video.title: Auditioning New Girlfriends

Video.summary: Alley and Jessica have a threesome with Nneka’s man Matt. Now Nneka’s here to get her revenge. Then, Jordan reveals to his girlfriend Cassandra that he may not be all the man she thinks he is. Plus more stories of relationships gone wild.
Video.title: Threesomes With My Sister

Video.summary: Jon is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating on her with her brother! Next Kelly will dump her boyfriend for her secret lover, Bart. Then Malikah will tell her fiancé that she's had a secret lover for the past 3 years!
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!

Video.summary: Glenda has been hiding two secrets from her boyfriend: She's secretly been seeing her ex and she wants to be a stripper! Then Veronica broke up with Roland when she caught him cheating. Now she's dating one of his friends and Roland wants her back.
Video.title: Secrets Come Out

Video.summary: Chris wants his wife Ariel to quit stripping, but she refuses. Next Jenna will tell her boyfriend, Tim, about her "banana split" act. Then twins Amber and Heather perform together on stage, but off stage they are fighting over the same man.
Video.title: Sexy Strippers Exposed!

Video.summary: A man cheats on his girlfriend, then tries to apologize; a woman realizes the father of her child could be her good friend's boyfriend; a woman gets more than she bargained for when she hooks up with her friend's roommate.
Video.title: Pregnant Secrets Dropped

Video.summary: Tanisha confronts her man and the dancer who hooked up with him; to try to get her boyfriend to marry her, Brandi has taken extraordinary measures to spice up their love life; Ashley needs to teach her coworker the importance of stripper etiquette.
Video.title: Strippers Shake It Up

Video.summary: Sarah confronts her boyfriend and the woman with whom he is rumored to have had a rendezvous; Thomas professes an emotional connection to his friend's girlfriend; Tootie breaks bad news to her boyfriend and his meddling sister.
Video.title: A Hot Minute

Video.summary: Becca wants to rekindle her relationship with her ex, who has a pregnant new girlfriend; best friends Cory, Jess and Juan find themselves in a love triangle; siblings Keimo and Keke learn that their significant others have hooked up.
Video.title: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Image.alt: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Video.summary: Stephanie's very suspicious that fiance Ryan has been cheating because he comes home reeking of body spray. Then Whisky business! After getting rejected in a proposal to his girlfriend, Bob polished off a bottle of whisky with her mother.
Video.title: Busted...On Bended Knee

Video.summary: Are you looking for fast cash but feel you don't have the skills well our guests today have started a family business…they're selling sex and they're ready to reveal their secrets!
Video.title: The Hooker Family Hour

Video.summary: Sheila fears that her teen grand-daughter is having sex with a 26-year old family-friend. Then, Jaquella started dating her boyfriend Shaquille when he was a teen. Shaquille's mother is here to confront Jaquella for sleeping with her child.
Video.title: Why Are You Dating A Child?

Image.alt: Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?

Video.summary: Shelly wants to prove to her boyfriend, Joshua, that he’s the father, but she slept with another man before she conceived. Then, Lala caught her boyfriend Tymont cheating. He claims he cheated to get even with her for soliciting sex for money!
Video.title: DNA: Steve Shocked by Results

Video.summary: Victoria says Dewayne harasses her, calls her horrible names and is physically abusive toward her; wedding plans are on hold until Trenell can pass a lie detector test.
Video.title: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Image.alt: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Video.summary: Lisa's longtime partner checks her body, spits on her and gives her black eyes; Cash says his ex-wife faked 11 pregnancies in the nine years they were together.
Video.title: 9 Years of Torture Ends Today

Video.summary: Adrian thinks Shantay has been lying throughout their relationship; Uniqua and her husband fear that he is not the father of her child; Chris' girlfriend wants him to know that one of their five children is not his.
Video.title: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Image.alt: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Video.summary: Shanetta's boyfriend says she has been acting strangely, and he fears that their son may not be his; Tabitha's partner wants to know if the men with whom he caught her are really her family members.
Video.title: Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test

Image.alt: Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test
Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test
Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test

Video.summary: With two small children at home, Anna's severe drug addiction has led her to prostituting to feed her habit. Her mother, who's had to raise the children, is terrified for her daughter's life.
Video.title: Steve Save My Daughter

Video.summary: Denise found out that Jamaul had another woman staying with him while she was out of town; Donna's husband claims that she has been unfaithful; Jason and Tammy's rocky relationship; lie detector tests for cheating accusations.
Video.title: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Image.alt: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Video.summary: Jannice fears telling her mother that she is a lesbian because she may get disowned.
Video.title: It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay

Image.alt: It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay
It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay
It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay

Video.summary: Destiny says that her daughter has unexplained bruises after visiting Brian. She also says the child told her someone grabbed her neck and threw her against a wall. Brian denies the abuse and believes that it is either Destiny or her boyfriend.
Video.title: Did You Hurt Our Daughter?

Video.summary: Misguided youth ... 15-year-old Gala is having some serious and dangerous issues with race and her mother Tanya believes she needs to change. Her out of control behavior has her sneaking out of the house, sleeping around with older men, and skipping school. Gala argues this is the way she was raised, but her mother blames Gala's boyfriend Patrick. With her behavior escalating, Steve's trying everything he can for one last attempt to open her mind.
Video.title: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Image.alt: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Video.summary: Brandie is a 16 year old sex addict who claims to have slept with over 200 men. Steve enlists the help of Marvelyn, a woman who contracted HIV at the age of 19. Then, Shantaysia is 19 years old and works as a prostitute.
Video.title: Teen Sex and Prostitution
